name_en: Diaries of Gojiin Temple (690 volumes)
description_en: A set of diaries, classified as a tangible cultural property (calligraphy and books). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. They are located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Diaries of the priest Ryūkō (20 volumes)
description_en: A set of diaries, classified as a tangible cultural property (calligraphy and books). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. They are located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Documents of Rinshō-in Temple (4,342 items)
description_en: A collection of documents, classified as a tangible cultural property (calligraphy and books). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2022. They are located at Yushima 4-1-8, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Monument inscribed with a Chinese poem by Tokugawa Narinobu (1 monument)
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2014. It is located at Ōtsuka 3-29-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Monument of the Mukōgaoka Record (1 monument)
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2014. It is located at Yayoi 2-11-16, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Ansei Nendai Komagome Fuji Jinja Shūhen no Zu oyobi Zusetsu Sankan
name_en: Maps and illustrated explanations of the area around Komagome Fuji Shrine in the Ansei era (3 scrolls)
description_en: A set of pictorial maps with explanatory text, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on February 27, 2015. They are located at Hongō 4-9-29, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Bingo no Kuni Fukuyama Hanshu Abeke Shiryō Gohyaku Sanjūyonten
name_en: Materials of the Abe family, lords of the Fukuyama Domain in Bingo Province (534 items)
description_en: A collection of historical materials, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2019. They are located at Hongō 4-9-29, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Shinjōin Hangi Gojūkyūmai tsuketari Mikuji Tansu Hitosao
name_en: Printing blocks of Shinjō-in Temple (59 blocks), with 1 fortune-lot chest
description_en: A set of woodblock printing blocks with an accompanying chest, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on June 2, 2025. They are located at Yushima 3-32-4, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Kōshin tower of the Otowa devotional confraternity (1 tower)
description_en: A stone Kōshin tower, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Tokugawa Ienobu Enazuka Ikki tsuketari Enazuka Hi Ikki
name_en: Placenta mound of Tokugawa Ienobu (1 mound), with 1 placenta-mound monument
description_en: A placenta mound with an accompanying monument, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Nezu 1-28-9, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Kien Hyōjinseki matchmaking notice stone (1 stone)
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1985. It is located at Yushima 3-30-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Materials related to the Fuji confraternity (22 items)
description_en: A collection of materials related to the Fujikō confraternity, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 2006. They are located at Hongō 4-9-29, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Kōshin tower of the Kōshin-machi Hyakumanben confraternity (1 tower)
description_en: A stone Kōshin tower, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2011. It is located at Mukōgaoka 2-38-22, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Sanza no Mai (Dance of the Three Seats)
description_en: A traditional performing art, classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1994. It is associated with Nezu Shrine at Nezu 1-28-9, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of the woman Miki
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Hakusan 2-9-12, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Ōta Nanpo
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Hakusan 4-34-7, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Takizawa Bakin
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Kohinata 4-9-5, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Site of the death of Higuchi Ichiyō
description_en: A historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Nishikata 1-17-8, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Ogata Kōan
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Mukōgaoka 2-37-5, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Site of the Ōarai Weir at the intake of the Kanda Aqueduct
description_en: A historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. It is located at Sekiguchi 1 (near Ōtakibashi Bridge), Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Site of the Oiwake distance-marker mound (ichirizuka)
description_en: A historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. It is located at Mukōgaoka 1-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Site of the former residence of Natsume Sōseki
description_en: A historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1982. It is located at Mukōgaoka 2-20-7, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Site of the Komagome vegetable market (tsuchimonodana)
description_en: A historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1983. It is located at Honkomagome 1-6-16, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Conder
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1985. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of the ascetic Miroku
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is designated by Bunkyo Ward. It is located at Mukōgaoka 2-25-10, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Odai
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is designated by Bunkyo Ward. It is located at Koishikawa 3-14-6, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Senhime
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is designated by Bunkyo Ward. It is located at Koishikawa 3-14-6, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Takako
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is designated by Bunkyo Ward. It is located at Koishikawa 3-14-6, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Grave of Kasuga no Tsubone
description_en: A grave, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is designated by Bunkyo Ward. It is located at Yushima 4-1-8, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Site of the death of Tokugawa Yoshinobu
description_en: A historic site in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2014. It is located at Kasuga 2-8-9, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Muku tree of Zenkōjizaka
description_en: A muku tree (Aphananthe aspera), classified as a natural monument in the monuments category. It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2013. It is located at Koishikawa 3-17 (in Koishikawa Pocket Park), Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: 'Awa no Kami Uchi' Mei no Ishigaki Ishi
name_en: Stone from a stone wall inscribed 'Awa no Kami uchi'
description_en: An inscribed stone-wall stone, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2006. It is located near Fujimi 2-9, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Gravestone of Izawa Yasōbee
description_en: A gravestone, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2012. It is located in the precincts of Shinpō-ji Temple at Kōjimachi 6-4-2, Chiyoda Ward.

name_romaji: Kyū Dōro Daichō Zumen (Kōjimachi-ku, Kanda-ku) tsuketari Dōro Daichō Rosen Ichiranzu (Kōjimachi)
name_en: Former road-register drawings (Kōjimachi and Kanda Wards), with a road-register route index map (Kōjimachi)
description_en: A set of road-register drawings, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). They were designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2015. They are located at the Hibiya Library and Museum, Hibiya Kōen 1-4, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Kōshin tower
description_en: A stone Kōshin tower, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2011. It is located in the precincts of Shinpō-ji Temple at Kōjimachi 6-4-2, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Monument at the site of the Imperial College of Engineering (Kōbu Daigakkō)
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 1993. It is located on the grounds of the Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology at Kasumigaseki 3-2, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Earthquake memorial monument
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2012. It is located at Kanda Surugadai 3-2, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Drawings of bridges built in the post-earthquake reconstruction (Kōjimachi and Kanda Wards)
description_en: A set of bridge drawings, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). They were designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2014. They are located at the Hibiya Library and Museum, Hibiya Kōen 1-4, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Mourning monument for Lord Ōkubo, posthumously honored as Minister of the Right
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 1992. It is located in Kiyosumidani Park at Kioichō 2, Chiyoda Ward.

name_en: Monument honoring Mizuno Toshikata
description_en: A stone monument, classified as a tangible cultural property (historical material). It was designated by Chiyoda Ward on April 1, 2001. It is located in the precincts of Kanda Shrine at Sotokanda 2-16-2, Chiyoda Ward.
